query:
SELECT id, acceptedAt, deliveredAt, deliveryDuration, 
       CASE 
         WHEN acceptedAt IS NULL THEN 'acceptedAt is NULL'
         WHEN deliveredAt IS NULL THEN 'deliveredAt is NULL'
         ELSE 'Both dates exist'
       END as issue
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'delivered' AND deliveryDuration IS NULL 
LIMIT 10;
command:

       CASE 
         WHEN acceptedAt IS NULL THEN 'acceptedAt is NULL'
         WHEN deliveredAt IS NULL THEN 'deliveredAt is NULL'
         ELSE 'Both dates exist'
       END as issue
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'delivered' AND deliveryDuration IS NULL 
LIMIT 10;
